Description: Verify that a user can log in with valid credentials.
Verify that a user can log out and session is cleared.
Verify that a new requirement can be created in a project.
Verify that an existing requirement can be edited.
Verify that a requirement can be deleted with confirmation.
Verify that requirements list filters by status.
Verify that requirements list filters by category.
Verify that a new verification can be created.
Verify that an existing verification can be edited.
Verify that a verification can be deleted.
Verify that a requirement can be linked to a verification in the matrix.
Verify that a traceability link can be removed from the matrix.
Verify that a baseline can be created from current requirements and traceability.
Verify that baseline detail shows snapshot of requirements.
Verify that baseline detail shows snapshot of traceability.
Verify that a baseline can be exported as ReqIF 1.2.
Verify that requirement version history is displayed correctly.
Verify that diff between two versions shows changes.
Verify that diff between baseline and current requirement works.
Verify that requirements can be imported from Excel/CSV.
Verify that verifications can be imported from Excel/CSV.
Verify that requirements can be exported to Excel.
Verify that traceability matrix can be exported as CSV.
Verify that a project member sees only accessible projects.
Verify that a non-member cannot see private projects.
Verify that an admin can create a new project.
Verify that a member can be added to a project with a role.
Verify that a member can be removed from a project.
Verify that View Requirements permission allows read-only access.
Verify that Edit Requirements permission allows create/edit/delete.
Verify that GET /api/projects/{id}/requirements returns requirements.
Verify that GET /api/projects/{id}/requirements/{req_id} returns a requirement.
Verify that POST creates a requirement with valid payload.
Verify that GET /verifications returns verifications.
Verify that POST creates a baseline for a project.
Verify that GET baseline verifications returns snapshot.
Verify that protected routes require a valid session cookie.
Verify that state-changing forms include CSRF token.
Verify that stored passwords are hashed not plaintext.
Verify that queries use parameterized statements.
Verify that requirement titles are escaped in HTML output.
Verify that requirements list paginates correctly.
Verify that verifications list paginates correctly.
Verify that text search filters requirements.
Verify that text search filters verifications.
Verify that requirement tree expand/collapse works.
Verify that card view renders requirement cards correctly.
Verify that table columns can be sorted.
Verify that category can be changed via inline edit.
Verify that status can be changed via inline edit.
Verify that requirement can be marked reviewed and approved.
Verify that traceability link is marked suspect when requirement changes.
Verify that a user can clear the suspect flag after review.
Verify that custom metadata fields can be defined per project.
Verify that custom field values can be set on requirement versions.
Verify that comments can be added to a requirement.
Verify that parent/child or other links can be set between versions.
Verify that requirement content is indexed for semantic search.
Verify that semantic search returns relevant requirements.
Verify that create actions are logged.
Verify that update actions are logged.
Verify that logs can be filtered by entity type and id.
Verify that categories can be created read updated deleted.
Verify that applicability options can be managed.
Verify that requirement statuses can be managed.
Verify that verification statuses can be managed.
Verify that verification methods can be managed.
Verify that a user can view their profile.
Verify that a user can update name or email.
Verify that admin can list users.
Verify that admin can create a new user.
Verify that admin can set a user password.
Verify that API bearer token can be created for project.
Verify that API accepts Bearer token for authorization.
Verify that current project can be exported as ReqIF.
Verify that requirements can be imported from ReqIF file.
Verify that matrix can be filtered by test status.
Verify that requirements report PDF can be generated.
Verify that a requirement can be duplicated with a new title.
Verify that copy link copies the requirement URL.
Verify that Ctrl+K opens semantic search.
Verify that Expand all expands all tree nodes.
Verify that Collapse all collapses the tree.
Verify that deleting a requirement handles children or blocks.
Verify that deleting a verification removes matrix links.
Verify that reference codes are unique per project not globally.
Verify that a specific version can be viewed via URL.
Verify that breadcrumbs reflect current page.
Verify that theme can be switched if supported.
Verify that layout adapts to narrow viewport.
Verify that empty state is shown when no requirements.
Verify that empty state is shown when no verifications.
Verify that required fields are validated on create.
Verify that reference code format is validated if configured.
Verify that validation errors are shown to the user.
Verify that cache is invalidated when data changes.
Verify that concurrent edits are handled safely.
Verify that list performance is acceptable with many items.
Verify that matrix CSV export completes in reasonable time.
Verify that main flows are keyboard accessible.
Verify that form controls have associated labels.
Verify that user-facing strings are in templates or i18n.
